title: Photonics Engineers
description: Design technologies specializing in light information or light energy, such as laser or fiber optics technology.

tasks.text: Analyze system performance or operational requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop optical or imaging systems, such as optical imaging products, optical components, image processes, signal process technologies, or optical systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop or test photonic prototypes or models.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design, integrate, or test photonics systems or components.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assist in the transition of photonic prototypes to production.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Read current literature, talk with colleagues, continue education, or participate in professional organizations or conferences to keep abreast of developments in the field.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Write reports or proposals related to photonics research or development projects.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Conduct testing to determine functionality or optimization or to establish limits of photonics systems or components.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine applications of photonics appropriate to meet product objectives or features.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct research on new photonics technologies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design electro-optical sensing or imaging systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Document photonics system or component design processes, including objectives, issues, or outcomes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design photonics products, such as light sources, displays, or photovoltaics, to achieve increased energy efficiency.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Train operators, engineers, or other personnel.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze, fabricate, or test fiber-optic links.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Design gas lasers, solid state lasers, infrared, or other light emitting or light sensitive devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Create or maintain photonic design histories.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Oversee or provide expertise on manufacturing, assembly, or fabrication processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Determine commercial, industrial, scientific, or other uses for electro-optical applications or devices.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Design solar energy photonics or other materials or devices to generate energy.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or redesign optical fibers to minimize energy loss.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop photonics sensing or manufacturing technologies to improve the efficiency of manufacturing or related processes.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop laser-processed designs, such as laser-cut medical devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design or develop new crystals for photonics applications.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design laser machining equipment for purposes such as high-speed ablation.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Select, purchase, set up, operate, or troubleshoot state-of-the-art laser cutting equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
